hero.title: Studio in Rome
hero.subtitle: A unique experience in the heart of the eternal city

description.title: The Studio
description.body: An elegant studio apartment located in the heart of Rome, just steps away from the city's main attractions. The studio has been tastefully renovated, blending classic Roman elements with modern comforts. Ideal for couples or solo travelers who want to experience Rome like a local.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: In the heart of Rome, Esquilino district
location.description: The studio is located in one of Rome's most vibrant and authentic neighborhoods, just a few minutes' walk from the Colosseum and Termini Station. The area has everything you need: local markets, traditional restaurants, and excellent public transport connections.

cta.title: Ready to experience Rome?
cta.subtitle: Book your stay at Studio Via Mentana and discover the eternal city like a local.

footer.tagline: An authentic experience in the heart of Rome
